---
title: "getting rid of GT table stripes in quarto"
format: html
editor: visual
table_css: FALSE
---

## Stripes

There seems to be a default rendering in quarto of adding stripes to tables.

If you want to remove stripes it does not want to.  



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(gt)
library(tidyverse)

# even adding option within GT does not fix the
mtcars |> 
  gt() |>
  opt_row_striping(row_striping = FALSE)

```


## Fix

If you add

html-table-processing: none

To the YAML, it seems to fix this issue and remove this as default.

Not sure if this affects other table packages but it may do.
